# Character Profiles

## Roland Deschain

Roland is the last gunslinger, a man out of time. He carries two revolvers made from the iron of Excalibur and has devoted his entire life to reaching the Dark Tower.

**Abilities**: Expert marksman, trained in hand-to-hand combat, limited resistance to magic.
**Weakness**: Obsessive focus on his quest sometimes blinds him to the needs of those around him.

## Jake Chambers

Jake is a boy from New York who was pulled into Roland's world through a magical doorway. Despite his youth, he has proven resourceful and brave.

**Abilities**: Latent magical sensitivity, quick thinking, adaptable.
**Weakness**: Homesick; sometimes overwhelmed by the strangeness of this world.

## The Man in Black (Walter)

The primary antagonist. Walter is a sorcerer of immense power who serves the Crimson King. He manipulates events from a distance, rarely getting his hands dirty.

**Abilities**: Powerful necromancer, can see all possible futures, shapeshifter.
**Weakness**: Overconfident; underestimates Roland's determination.
